input: Write a lifecycle email that nudges trial users to invite teammates.
subject_line: Bring your team into the workspace
body: You created your first project. The next step is getting your team into the same workspace so decisions do not stay trapped in side chats. Invite one teammate today and use the shared brief to align on the next campaign. Get started from your workspace settings.
output: Bring your team into the workspace You created your first project. The next step is getting your team into the same workspace so decisions do not stay trapped in side chats. audience: Marketing operators at mid-stage SaaS companies
input: Write a lifecycle email announcing a new reporting feature.
subject_line: New reporting that saves your Monday
body: Your weekly campaign readout can now be generated automatically. Open the reporting tab, choose the campaigns you care about, and share a clean summary with your team before standup. Try it on your next campaign.
output: New reporting that saves your Monday Your weekly campaign readout can now be generated automatically. Open the reporting tab, choose the campaigns you care about, and share a clean summary with your team before standup. Try it on your next campaign.

input: Write a lifecycle email for a user who has not logged in for 30 days.
body: Your workspace is still here, including the briefs and campaign notes you started. If this still matters, reply with the campaign you are trying to move forward and we will point you to the fastest next step.
output: A quick way back Your workspace is still here, including the briefs and campaign notes you started. If this still matters, reply with the campaign you are trying to move forward and we will point you to the fastest next step.
